NODE	extension/extension.yml	yml
NODE	extension/scripts/entry.sh	sh
NODE	extension/scripts/helper.sh	sh
NODE	install.sh	sh
NODE	speckit.widget.hello	command
EDGE	installs	install.sh	.specify/extensions/widget	EXTRACTED
EDGE	invokes	extension/scripts/entry.sh	extension/scripts/helper.sh	EXTRACTED
EDGE	registers_hook	extension/extension.yml	speckit.widget.hello	EXTRACTED
